title: tragacantha macrocephala
intro: Tragacantha macrocephala, also known as Tragacanth, is a type of plant that belongs to the Astragalus genus and is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and wounds due to its ability to form a protective barrier and soothe inflammation. The health benefits of Tragacantha macrocephala include its potential to aid in the treatment of diarrhea, coughs, and sore throats, as well as its use as a natural laxative. Herbal preparations of Tragacantha macrocephala often involve its use in teas, ointments, and poultices, which can be used externally to treat wounds and internally to support digestive health.
